title: Global Wastewater Treatment Plant Virus Database (WVirDB)
author: Yuan, Ling
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset contains 298,933 DNA viral genomes from 407 global WWTP metagenomes and 11,788 RNA viral genomes from 572 global WWTP metatranscriptomes.
steps_raw: The dataset contains 298,933 DNA viral genomes from 407 global WWTP metagenomes and 11,788 RNA viral genomes from 572 global WWTP metatranscriptomes.
